case_title: EQUITY RESIDENTIAL MANAGEMENT, LLC VS. OR DAYAN ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EQUITY RESIDENTIAL MANAGEMENT, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DAYAN, OR DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 855 BRANNAN STREET # 549, SAN FRANCISCO, SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY , CA 94103, ** JUDGMENT APPLIES TO ALL OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES INCLUDING TENANTS, SUBTENANTS IF ANY AND NAMED CLAIMANTS IF ANY ** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 210066174)
DECLARATION FOR DEFAULT JUDGMENT BY COURT (UNLAWFUL DETAINER - CODE CIVIL PROC., 585(D)) FILED BY PLAINTIFF EQUITY RESIDENTIAL MANAGEMENT, LLC
VERIFICATION BY LANDLORD REGARDING RENTAL ASSISTANCE (COVER SHEETS) (TRANSACTION ID # 210066174) FILED BY PLAINTIFF EQUITY RESIDENTIAL MANAGEMENT, LLC

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 210066174), PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF EQUITY RESIDENTIAL MANAGEMENT, LLC SERVED FEB-13-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT DAYAN, OR
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT DAYAN, OR
UNLAWFUL DETAINER COVER SHEET (RENT DUE AFTER 3/31/2022) FILED BY PLAINTIFF EQUITY RESIDENTIAL MANAGEMENT, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT DAYAN, OR DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE IS $124.10 PER DAY. (TRANSACTION ID # 210066174) FILED BY PLAINTIFF EQUITY RESIDENTIAL MANAGEMENT, LLC
REQUEST FOR COURT JUDGMENT BY DEFAULT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $683.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT DAYAN, OR

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF EQUITY RESIDENTIAL MANAGEMENT, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT DAYAN, OR DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

PROOF OF SERVICE OF VERIFICATION BY LANDLORD REGARDING RENTAL ASSISTANCE -UNLAWFUL DETAINER (TRANSACTION ID # 210066174) FILED BY PLAINTIFF EQUITY RESIDENTIAL MANAGEMENT, LLC SERVED MAR-05-2024, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT DAYAN, OR

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF EQUITY RESIDENTIAL MANAGEMENT, LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DAYAN, OR THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: POSSESSION NO LONGER AT ISSUE $7,733.87 RENT, $1,317.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $683.00 COSTS, $9,555.70 HOLDOVER DAMAGES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $19,289.57, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 210066174) AS TO DEFENDANT DAYAN, OR DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT DAYAN, OR
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 210066174), PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF EQUITY RESIDENTIAL MANAGEMENT, LLC SERVED FEB-13-2024, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10 INCLUSIVE
